basic_details.job_title: NIT Silchar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Silchar (NIT Silchar) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on 15 July 2026 on the official website https://www.nits.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Silchar Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC/WOMEN/PWD candidates will get relaxation as per Govt. of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech/B.E. in Electrical /Electronics Engineering from recognized university
qualification.details: B. Tech/B.E. in Electrical /Electronics Engineering from a recognized university.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month (for GATE/NET qualified candidates) Rs. 31,000/- per month (for others)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Silchar Project Associate -I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nits.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Silchar Project Associate -I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.nits.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Silchar Project Associate -I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Silchar Project Associate -I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Project Associate -I post at NIT Silchar is 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate -I position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B. Tech/B.E. degree in Electrical or Electronics Engineering from a recognized university to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate -I role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Associate -I position ranges from Rs. 31,000/- to Rs. 37,000/- per month, depending on GATE/NET qualification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Associate -I post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate -I post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the NIT Silchar Project Associate -I vacancy?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply offline by sending their filled application form along with required documents to the address specified in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate -I post at NIT Silchar will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITS/Dean(R&C)/ EE/716/01/2026.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Project Associate -I position at NIT Silchar is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of NIT Silchar, www.nits.ac.in. The direct links are provided in the Important Links section.
